name: SARS-CoV-2_Omicron_BA.1
description: Omicron BA.1 (Botswana/SA, Nov 2021). Spike ≥30 mutations incl. A67V, Δ69-70, T95I, Δ142-144, Y145D, Δ211, L212I, ins214EPE, G339D, S371L, S373P, S375F, K417N, N440K, G446S, S477N, T478K, E484A, Q493R, G496S, Q498R, N501Y, Y505H, T547K, D614G, H655Y, N679K, P681H, N764K, D796Y, N856K, Q954H, N969K, L981F. Massive antigenic shift.
